mapper.insert: INSERT INTO invoice_request (order_id, user_id, invoice_type, title, tax_number, bank_name, bank_account, address, phone, receive_email, status) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{invoiceType}, #{title}, #{taxNumber}, #{bankName}, #{bankAccount}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{receiveEmail}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM invoice_request WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE invoice_request SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE invoice_request SET invoice_number = #{invoiceNumber} WHERE id = #{id}
